title: chenopodium × paradoxum
intro: Chenopodium × paradoxum, also known as Good King Henry, is a hybrid plant species within the Chenopodium genus, derived from the cross between Chenopodium bonus-henricus and Chenopodium rubrum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include the ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Chenopodium × paradoxum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
